title: Substance Use Disorder Counseling * Domestic Violence Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Substance Use Disorder Counseling * Domestic Violence Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community Domestic Violence Issues Ex-Offenders Hispanic/Latino Community Mothers Native American Community Pregnant Individuals Veterans Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF GATEWAY CENTER FOR DOMESTIC VIOLENCE SERVICES ALCOHOL AND DRUG COUNSELING AND ADVOCACY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health and substance abuse assessments. Specialists provide consultations, referrals, support and resources to staff, and group therapy, such as Seeking Safety. All consultations and assessments are confidential, except when there's a risk of harm to oneself or others, or in cases of child, disabled person, or elder abuse. 10305 E Burnside Street Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing the impacts of intimate partner violence and/or sexual assult Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (503) 988-6400 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GATEWAY CENTER FOR DOMESTIC VIOLENCE SERVICES ALCOHOL AND DRUG COUNSELING AND ADVOCACY
